summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WTF Agency Brief Destroyers landing page. All 5 full-screen background sections working perfectly with proper black/white design scheme and smooth navigation.
passed_tests: Hero section with VR dog full-screen background image loads correctly
WTF logo with 4 circles (W, T, F, ¿) displays properly in navigation and sections
Philosophy section with white horses background image working
Process section with F1 racer background showing 5 steps: Think, Make, Move, Learn, Scale
Capabilities section with woman with goggles background and 5 capability items
Work/Case Studies section with red heels background and all 8 client names: Motorola, Absolut, Honda, Ford, Samsung, Havana Club, Bayer, Quilmes
Team section with statistics grid showing correct values: 15+ Years, 6 Offices, 50+ Cells, ∞ Briefs
Offices section displaying all 6 locations: Buenos Aires (HQ), Madrid, Santiago, Asunción, Lima, CDMX
Contact section with WTF logo and proper CTAs
All 4 mailto links pointing correctly to hello@wtfagency.com
Navigation smooth scroll functionality working for all sections
Black and white color scheme maintained throughout
All background images loading and displaying full-screen
Gradient overlays working properly on background images
Typography using Anton font for headings as specified
Responsive design working on desktop viewport
All interactive elements (buttons, links) are clickable
